description:
Fragment from the bottom of a ketubba. Dating: mid-12th century. Refers to a sum of 20 dinars as part of the marriage payments and refers to the groom's "previous wife." The witness and validation sections at the bottom are quite jumbled - the parchment is crumpled in places and hidden behinds folds in other places. Names of witnesses and/or validating judges:
- Nadiv ha-Parnas Rosh ha-Parnasim
- Berakhot ha-Ḥazzan [...] ha-Levi
- [...] ha-Kohen b. Yeḥezqel
- Berakhot b. Shela ha-Kohen
- Meshullam b. Yaʿaqov
- Yaʿaqov ha-Kohen b. [...]
- Hillel b. Sadoq Av Bet Din
- Shemuʾel b. Saʿadya ha-Levi
